content_body:
In the scenic Appalachian Mountains just 100 miles north of Atlanta lies Blue Ridge, Georgia, a hub for off-road adventures. From navigating scenic ATV trails to cruising serene mountain biking paths, Blue Ridge promises an unforgettable experience for adventure-seekers of all kinds. These outdoor activities in Blue Ridge, GA are the perfect addition to spice up your mountain vacation.

ATV Trails in Blue Ridge, GA


Courtesy of Blue Ridge Off Road Adventures

For those eager to experience the raw beauty of the Blue Ridge Area, several North Georgia ATV trails offer varying levels of difficulty and scenic vistas. Whether you decide to bring your own recreational vehicle or rent one from a local Blue Ridge ATV rental company, excitement and exhilaration are just around the bend. 

  • Beasley Knob OHV Trail System

    Located in nearby Blairsville just 25 miles from Blue Ridge, Beasley Knob features over 10 miles of interconnected trails. Rated from difficult to most difficult, these trails are recommended for experienced riders. Featuring gravel roads and rocky climbs, these Chattahoochee National Forest trails provide a challenging experience for off-road enthusiasts.

  • Davenport Mountain OHV Trails 

    About 21 miles east of Blue Ridge, Davenport Mountain offers a 5.9-mile trail suitable for ATVs and motorcycles. Boasting views of Lake Nottely and a variety of terrain, Davenport Mountain offers a scenic excursion for motorcyclists and ATV riders alike. 

  • Whissenhunt OHV Trails

    Located near Dahlonega, about 50 miles from Blue Ridge, Whissenhunt boasts 11.2 miles of trails suitable for motorcycles and ATVs with a width of 50 inches or less. Offering switchbacks and mild rocky terrain with some exciting climbs, this easy to intermediate level trail makes for a scenic day trip on your ATV adventures.

ATV Rentals in Blue Ridge


Courtesy of Blue Ridge Scenic Rentals

If you decide not to trailer your own ATVs to your luxury cabin, there are a couple of ATV rental businesses in town that can supply your needs! 

  • Blue Ridge Off Road Adventures: This establishment offers off-road UTV rentals! Their expert guides accompany you on your adventure, ensuring a safe and exciting journey through the Blue Ridge Mountains.
  • Blue Ridge Scenic Rentals: They specialize in providing top-of-the-line UTV and ATV rentals and handpicked trails for your exploration. Their vehicles are designed to handle the rugged terrain of the Blue Ridge Mountains, ensuring a safe and thrilling experience.

Mountain Biking Trails in Blue Ridge


Courtesy of Clint Gribbs

For mountain biking thrill-seekers, Blue Ridge offers a variety of trails in the Aska Adventure Area and Cohutta Wilderness that cater to different skill levels, each providing unique challenges and beautiful views.

  • Long Branch Loop (Easy)

    Located off of Aska Road, Long Branch Loop is a beginner-friendly trail known for its smooth terrain. Offering a wide and shaded path, the peaceful views and manageable grade of Long Branch Loop are perfect for families or riders looking for a relaxed experience. 

  • Flat Creek Loop (Moderate)

    Also positioned in the Aska Adventure Area, Flat Creek Loop is a 5.4-mile loop renowned for its moderate terrain. Winding over small creeks and past small waterfalls, this loop features a natural surface ideal for intermediate riders. Seasonal views from various points along the trail make it a favorite for mountain bikers seeking both adventure and scenic beauty.

  • Stanley Gap (Difficult)

    Part of the Aska Trail System, Stanley Gap is a 9.6-mile out-and-back trail that rewards riders with a 1,000-foot descent over two miles on narrow singletrack filled with roots and rocks. The loop includes climbs on the Green Mountain Trail and descents on the Long Branch Loop, offering a comprehensive mountain biking experience.

Mountain Bike Rentals in Blue Ridge

For those without their own mountain bikes, reach out to Blue Mountain Bikes! Known for its local knowledge and expert guidance, their shop's range of mountain bikes are the perfect starting point for your excursion before you hit the trails.

Blue Ridge Luxury Cabins Near Outdoor Activities

 Our handpicked selection of luxury cabins ensure that you can confidently experience the best of North Georgia! Our Aska Adventure Area cabins are conveniently situated close to mountain biking trails, and our cabins with paved access offer the perfect terrain for trailering your recreational vehicles. 

Concluding Thoughts

Blue Ridge is known for its variety of outdoor things to do, and off-road adventures are an integral part of the rich terrain. Whether you're seeking the thrill of the ride or the peace of being in nature, Blue Ridge provides the perfect setting for your next adventure.
title: Off-Road Adventures in Blue Ridge: ATV Trails and Mountain Biking
